headline: AI Podcast Generation: Text-to-Speech Narration, AI Hosts, and Automated Audio Content
description: AI generates podcasts -- from NotebookLM's AI hosts discussing uploaded documents to ElevenLabs narrating audiobooks to Spotify's AI DJ. The podcast creation pipeline is being compressed from hours of recording/editing to minutes of AI generation.

citation.name: AI-Powered Audio Content Creation: Podcast Generation, Text-to-Speech Narration, and Automated Audio Production (2024-2025 Survey)
Conversational AI for Audio Content: Multi-Speaker Dialogue Generation and Narrative Podcast Production
